efs.accesspoint.accesspointtag.CfnAbout: A tag is a key-value pair attached to a file system. Allowed characters in the `Key` and `Value` properties are letters, white space, and numbers that can be represented in UTF-8, and the following characters:` + - = . _ : /`

efs.accesspoint.accesspointtag.Key.Description: The tag key (String). The key can't start with `aws:`.

efs.accesspoint.accesspointtag.Value.Description: The value of the tag key.
